span.style: width: 275px; bottom: 72px; right: -50px; text-align: center; padding: 3px; line-height: 22px; color: #f0f0f0; transform: rotate(-45deg); position: fixed; box-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); background: Tomato; opacity: 0.6; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999

width: 275px; bottom: 72px; right: -50px; text-align: center; padding: 3px; line-height: 22px; color: #f0f0f0; transform: rotate(-45deg); position: fixed; box-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); background: #008000; opacity: 0.6; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999
